question: Will CPI rise more than 0.9% in March 2026?
reasoning: The March 2026 CPI data has been officially released by the BLS, showing a 0.3% monthly increase. Since 0.3% is significantly below the 0.9% threshold required for YES resolution, the market should resolve to NO with 100% certainty. The current market price of 31% appears to reflect outdated pre-release speculation and has not yet adjusted to the actual data.
key_factors: Official BLS data shows 0.3% CPI increase in March 2026
Data released April 10, 2026 at 8:30 AM ET
Market closes April 10 at 12:25 PM, giving time for price adjustment
risks: Potential data revision (though rare for initial CPI releases)
Market may be slow to incorporate the official results
